#  Export a PCCO as an OCO to CMiC 
##  Background 
During a construction project, you will often create prime contract change orders. When a PCCO is created in Procore, you might need to export it as an OCO to CMiC. Follow the steps below to export a Procore PCCO as an OCO to CMiC.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To enable the ‘Create Owner Change Orders’ setting,_ 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Admin tool.
    * _To submit a request to enable the feature in your company's Procore account,_ you must be your company's Procore Administrator or the CMiC integration contact on your company's Procore account.
  * **Requirements:**
    * Your company's Procore Administrator must submit a request to your company's Procore point of contact to enable this feature on the backend of Procore.
    * A user with 'Admin' permission on the project's Admin tool must enable the capability to create owner change orders as described in the steps below.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Not all ERP Integrations support the creation of owner change orders.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Admin** tool.
  2. Under 'Project Settings', click **General**.
  3. Scroll to 'Advanced'.
  4. Mark the checkbox to **Create Owner Change Orders**.
  5. Click **Update**.
  6. Complete the steps in [Export a PCCO to ERP](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/erp-integrations-company/tutorials/export-a-pcco-to-erp).


## See Also
  * [CMiC - Detailed Data Mapping](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/cmic/detailed-data-mapping)
  * [CMiC - Things to Know](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/cmic/things-to-know)
  * [Export a PCCO with Multiple PCOs as Individual PCIs to CMiC](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/cmic/tutorials/export-a-pcco-with-multiple-pcos-as-individual-pcis-to-cmic)
title: Export a PCCO as an OCO to CMiC
description: Export a Prime Contract Change Order (PCCO) as an Owner Change Order (OCO) to CMiC.
